info.name: Govexa API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Govexa student transportation platform.

**Environments:**
- Local: `http://localhost:3000`
- Staging: set `baseUrl` variable accordingly

**Auth:** Most endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`.
Obtain a token via `POST /api/auth/login` and set the `accessToken` collection variable.

**Maintenance rule:** Every route added or changed in `apps/api` MUST have a matching
request added or updated here in the same PR. See `docs/repositories/api/RULES.md`.

variable.description: API base URL. Override per environment.
JWT access token. Set after login.
JWT refresh token. Set after login.
